name: Brimington

locations.address:
Chesterfield Police Station, 
Beetwell Street, 
Chesterfield

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area includes Brimington. It is covered by the Chesterfield North Safer Neighbourhood Policing Team and belongs to the Chesterfield Local Policing Unit.
Brimington is mainly a residential area within Chesterfield Borough Council, approximately two miles from Chesterfield town centre. It is situated on the main road linking Chesterfield town centre with the M1 motorway.
